headline: Precision Agriculture Research Report 2026: Market to Reach $17.29 Billion by 2031 with John Deere, AGCO, CNH Industrial, Trimble, and Topcon Dominating
summary: The Precision Agriculture Market is projected to grow from USD 9.50 Billion in 2025 to USD 17.29 Billion by 2031, at a CAGR of 10.50%. This growth is driven by advancements in AI-enabled agronomy, rising sustainability priorities, and the need to combat increasing input costs. Key components like hardware, especially guidance and steering systems, dominate, while farm management software sees rising CAGRs.
